verses.text: 'O sing unto the LORD a new song; for he hath done marvellous things,' His right hand winning salvation and remembering His mercy to His people. Redemption calls for fresh praise. God's saving acts are ever new reason for song.

'O sing unto the LORD a new song; for he hath done marvellous things,' His right hand winning salvation and remembering His mercy to His people. Redemption calls for fresh praise. God's saving acts are ever new reason for song.

'O sing unto the LORD a new song; for he hath done marvellous things,' His right hand winning salvation and remembering His mercy to His people. Redemption calls for fresh praise. God's saving acts are ever new reason for song.
'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all the earth,' with harp, trumpet, and voice. Praise is loud and glad. The whole world is summoned to rejoice before its King.
'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all the earth,' with harp, trumpet, and voice. Praise is loud and glad. The whole world is summoned to rejoice before its King.
'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all the earth,' with harp, trumpet, and voice. Praise is loud and glad. The whole world is summoned to rejoice before its King.

Let the sea roar, the floods clap, and the hills sing, for He comes 'to judge the earth... with righteousness.' Creation joins the chorus. The coming of the righteous Judge is the joy of all the world.
